prompt_order.title: DISTRIBUTED_AUTHORITY_FOUNDATIONS-0
human_review_requirements: trust_root_governance_changes FULL review when trust convergence is implicated
lifecycle_manager_semantics FULL review when state handoff legality is implicated
stop_conditions: stop if authority handoff semantics assume live execution instead of doctrine-level foundations
stop if proof-anchor quorum or deterministic replication proof is silently treated as solved
stop if distributed authority outruns trust admission, receipt continuity, or hotswap boundaries
notes: Ready status is doctrine-only and does not admit distributed implementation or Ζ live ops.
Φ-B5 must extend live shard/net precursor substrate rather than replace it.

prompt_order.title: DISTRIBUTED_AUTHORITY_FOUNDATIONS_REASSESSMENT-0
dependencies: completed Φ-B5 doctrine and registry artifacts
human_review_requirements: checkpoint must verify no distributed implementation work was performed
checkpoint must verify Φ-B5 stayed subordinate to trust admission, receipt continuity, release semantics, and hotswap boundaries
stop_conditions: stop before any Ζ planning or distributed implementation until the post-Φ-B5 checkpoint exists
notes: This checkpoint decides whether a residual Υ-D3 consolidation tail is still needed.

prompt_order.title: LIVE_RELEASE_CONTROLLER_AND_AUTOMATION_ALIGNMENT-0
dependencies: post-Φ-B5 checkpoint explicitly finds controller-specific or operationalization-specific residue
human_review_requirements: do not schedule unless the post-Φ-B5 checkpoint identifies a distinct residue rather than restating closed admission law
stop_conditions: skip if the post-Φ-B5 checkpoint finds no distinct controller-specific residue
notes: Not required before Φ-B5 from the current checkpoint state.

stability.replacement_target: later post-Φ-B5 next-order artifact may refine sequence without replacing the ordering law frozen here
